description_long: A visually appealing sushi set is presented on a rectangular wooden board, featuring a large block of salmon nigiri with a nori seaweed wrap, two maki rolls with visible fillings of fish and vegetables, and a neat mound of green wasabi. The salmon nigiri is characterized by its thick, glossy orange slice of salmon draped over a compact white rice base, secured with a dark green nori strip. The maki rolls are wrapped in nori, with their cross-sections revealing pink fish, pale green avocado, and white rice. A pair of black chopsticks rests diagonally across the board, adding a touch of elegance and functionality. The wooden board has a rich brown color and a smooth finish, providing a natural contrast to the vibrant sushi. The overall arrangement is clean and inviting, with the wasabi placed to the side as a garnish.
description: A sushi set on a wooden board features a large salmon nigiri, two maki rolls, a mound of wasabi, and black chopsticks. The presentation is colorful and neatly arranged.
description_view_0: The sushi set is seen from the side, highlighting the salmon nigiri's layered structure and the maki rolls' cross-sections, with chopsticks extending to the right.
description_view_1: A frontal view shows the full face of the salmon nigiri, both maki rolls, the wasabi mound, and the chopsticks resting on the board.
description_view_2: The set is viewed from the opposite side, focusing on the salmon nigiri and a single maki roll, with chopsticks lying across the board.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the back of the salmon nigiri and a maki roll, with the nori wrap and wooden board clearly visible.
